name: UMAPS
message: VIDEO OF FILES PART1 - http://cybertube.video/web/index.html#!/details?id=160b79ab060e136a02e655272228597f&serverId=2be5e68176ff4f8fbb930fe66321ab72 . Youtube videos will be posted, if we will not get the required payment amount . The "Unidad Municipal de Agua Potable y Saneamiento" (Municipal Unit of Potable Water and Sanitation) typically refers to a local government entity responsible for managing the supply of clean drinking water and sanitation services within a municipality or local area.
